description_long: This is a stylized adult human figure with a slender, athletic build and a dynamic, slightly aggressive stance. The silhouette reveals spiked accessories on the wrists and boots, suggesting a punk or combat-inspired fashion. The figure's hair is voluminous and asymmetrical, swept to one side, adding to the edgy appearance. The clothing appears form-fitting, with a short top and shorts or a skirt, and a belt or strap detail at the waist. The hands are elongated, with fingers possibly extended or adorned with claw-like accessories. The overall design is bold and expressive, suitable for an urban or action-oriented environment.
description: A stylized adult figure with spiked accessories, asymmetrical voluminous hair, and form-fitting, edgy clothing. The posture and details suggest a punk or combat-inspired urban character.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the spiked wristbands, form-fitting outfit, and asymmetrical hair swept to the left.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the protruding spikes on the boots and wrist, and the forward-projecting hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, the fit of the clothing, and the spiked wristbands and boots.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the same spiked accessories and the silhouette of the hair and outfit from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting top and shorts or skirt with spiked wristbands and boots, punk or combat-inspired style
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length, voluminous, swept to one side
